name: www.ahmadiyya.ca
message: [AI generated] "www.ahmadiyya.ca" is the official website for Ahmadiyya Muslim Jama'at Canada, a religious community of Muslims who accept Mirza Ghulam Ahmad as the Promised Messiah. The organization promotes a peaceful understanding of Islam and the spiritual rejuvenation through the advent of the Promised Messiah. They also engage in educational, humanitarian, and interfaith activities.
